overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player navigating a dystopian futuristic city street. The clip progresses from walking past neon signage through a combat encounter with armed enemies, ending at the dark entrance of a massive mega-building.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned downtown street with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the deserted street, passing an abandoned vehicle

notable_agents.action: abandoned white sedan parked in the middle of the street

entered.detail: large curved building facade with bright red neon lettering reading City of Sin
colorful graffiti-covered concrete barriers lining the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the center median of the street
industrial construction cranes silhouetted against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit dystopian city street dominated by a large neon sign reading City of Sin on the left. The camera moves forward past an abandoned white car, with palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance.

events.description: approaching the curved theatre building with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, approaching pedestrians sitting on the sidewalk near the theatre

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on the sidewalk near a fire hydrant

entered.detail: large curved structure with red neon Theatre signage and weathered facade
damaged street lamp leaning at an angle over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the street approaching a distinctive curved theatre building with prominent red signage. Two people are seen sitting on the sidewalk to the left as the camera passes the theatre entrance, with palm trees now closer in view.

events.description: encountering armed enemy combatants ahead in the street
engaging in gunfire with enemies taking cover behind obstacles

agents.ego_description: engaging enemy combatants with firearms, moving tactically through the intersection while taking cover

notable_agents.action: enemy soldier with large orange shield advancing toward the camera
enemy combatant firing from behind cover near a palm tree

entered.detail: scattered rubble and trash accumulated on the cracked asphalt
bright orange construction barricade blocking part of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to active combat as armed enemies appear ahead, one carrying a distinctive large orange shield. Gunfire erupts as the camera moves through the intersection, passing debris and abandoned vehicles while engaging the hostiles.

events.description: entering the deep shadow of the massive building, lighting becomes significantly darker
approaching the dark imposing entrance under the mega-structure

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously toward the dark building entrance, weapon at the ready

entered.detail: massive dark entrance to a skyscraper with industrial smoke vents
derelict cargo trailer with heavily rusted metal sides
colorful spray-painted graffiti covering the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: After the combat encounter, the camera continues toward a massive dark building entrance. The lighting shifts dramatically to shadow as the camera moves under the overhanging structure, passing rusted trailers and graffiti-covered pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit dystopian street that descends into a violent skirmish before ending in the oppressive shadows of a mega-structure. It begins by moving past a large City of Sin neon sign and an abandoned white car, with palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers framing the distant horizon. As the camera advances, the scene opens up toward a curved theatre building with prominent red signage and pedestrians resting on the sidewalk. The atmosphere then shifts abruptly into active combat at a debris-strewn intersection, where the camera pushes through gunfire and engages enemies carrying large orange shields. Finally, the lighting transitions from bright daylight to deep shadow as the camera moves past rusted trailers and graffiti-covered pavement toward the dark entrance of a massive building.
